task_completion.description: Search for and view the Acrolein chemical datasheet on CAMEO Chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window showing the CAMEO Chemicals website with the datasheet for Acrolein loaded.

task_completion.description: Search for and view the Sodium Chlorate chemical datasheet on CAMEO Chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window showing the CAMEO Chemicals website with the datasheet for Sodium Chlorate loaded.

task_completion.description: Search for and view the Toluene chemical datasheet on CAMEO Chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window showing the CAMEO Chemicals website with the datasheet for Toluene loaded.

task_completion.description: Create the nfpa_report.txt file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) open with the file named 'nfpa_report.txt' located in /home/ga/Desktop, or a terminal showing the file creation.

task_completion.description: Correctly record the NFPA 704 ratings for Acrolein and Toluene in the report using the exact format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows Acrolein (Health: 4, Flammability: 3, Instability: 3, Special: NONE) and Toluene (Health: 2, Flammability: 3, Instability: 0, Special: NONE) with the exact requested headers.

task_completion.description: Correctly record the NFPA 704 ratings for Sodium Chlorate in the report using the exact format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows Sodium Chlorate ratings. Flammability must be 0, Instability 1, and Special OX. Health may vary (1, 2, 3, or missing/not listed) based on CAMEO's current data.

task_completion.description: Correctly calculate and record the Area Maximum Ratings at the bottom of the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the 'Area Maximum Ratings' section with Health: 4, Flammability: 3, Instability: 3, and Special: OX.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to navigate CAMEO Chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing in the search bar, clicking links, or scrolling through the CAMEO Chemicals website rather than using a terminal script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the NFPA 704 sections before writing the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser is scrolled to the NFPA 704 fire diamond or hazard section for the chemicals before the agent switches to the text editor to type the values.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a text editor to format the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI text editor or terminal-based editor (like nano/vim) is visible with the agent actively typing or pasting the formatted text, rather than just running a single echo command with the final text.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified NFPA 704 ratings:
- Acrolein: Health: 4, Flammability: 3, Instability: 3, Special: NONE
- Toluene: Health: 2, Flammability: 3, Instability: 0, Special: NONE
- Sodium Chlorate: Flammability: 0, Instability: 1, Special: OX (Health rating is disputed/unavailable on CAMEO; accept 1, 2, 3, or 'Not Listed')
- Area Maximum Ratings: Health: 4, Flammability: 3, Instability: 3, Special: OX
Output file must be at /home/ga/Desktop/nfpa_report.txt with the exact headers and spacing specified in the prompt.
